title: Wynncraft Modpack
description: A modpack that enhance your gameplay experience while playing Wynncraft.
body:
WynnCraft Modpack
---
Wynncraft Modpack is a modpack of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience while playing Wynncraft.

Modpack Features
---
- Optimizes in the Minecraft network stack. Reduces CPU and memory usage.
- Prevents the rendering of things you cannot see to improve performance.
- Optimizations for Minecraft users who have a NVIDIA GPU.
- Display total damage within a specific period of time.
- Adds features found in Optifine to this modpack, like particle and animation settings.
- Spell caster for Wynncraft.
- Seeks to enhance the gameplay experience of Wynncraft with a variety of features.
- Utility for Wynncraft, fixes reveal nicknames, stack dupe messages, and more.
- Allows for your render distance to be greater than the server's view-distance.

FAQ
---
<details>
<summary>What is Wynncraft and how do I play it?</summary>

**Wynncraft** is an open world MMORPG, full of adventures, unique experiences, and places to explore. From diverse landscapes, cities, and villages to mysterioues forest and spooky dungeons. Engage in a trilling adventure as you explore around to challenge your skills and complete quest solo or with team up with friends.

Ready to explore? Join using Wynncraft's server IP: wynncraft.com

</details>
